Second Wind Music Productions

Professional Multimedia
Production Services

"Makin' Silk Purses out of Silk!"

Dedicated to producing the highest quality multimedia services at the lowest cost — for performing artists, weddings, birthdays, and corporate events in the greater Charlotte area.

Get in Touch View Portfolio

What We Do

From capturing a live performance to mastering a finished album, Second Wind Music Productions handles every step of the process with care and professionalism.

🎥

Live Video Capture

Professional multi-camera recording of live performances, concerts, and events. We bring the production quality your music deserves.

🎙️

Demo Recording

High-quality demo recordings to help performing artists showcase their sound to booking agents, venues, and fans.

💿

CD Mastering

Professional audio mastering to make your recordings sound their best across all playback systems and platforms.

📀

DVD Authoring

Full DVD authoring and production — menus, chapters, and professional packaging for your live recordings.

🎨

CD & DVD Label Design

Custom label and cover design that reflects your brand and gets noticed on the shelf and online.

🌐

Web Design & Hosting

Website design, maintenance, and hosting tailored for performing artists and small businesses. Modern, fast, and mobile-friendly.

About Second Wind Music Productions

Second Wind Music Productions is owned and operated by Greg Baker, a degreed engineer and lifelong musician based in the Charlotte, NC area.

Greg's dual background in engineering and music means every project gets both technical precision and artistic sensibility. Whether you're a solo singer-songwriter or a full band, Second Wind brings your vision to life.

Our primary focus is performing artists, but we're also available for weddings, birthdays, and other family or corporate events.

Work With Us

Ready to start your project?

Email Greg today to discuss your needs.
